title: 1.12.2/1.20/1.21 Optimized Forgium
body:
Optimized Forgium – Max Performance, Completely Client Side

Optimized Forgium is a client-side Minecraft modpack built on Forge, designed to push your game’s performance to the limit without compromising the vanilla experience. Whether you’re exploring vast landscapes, building massive structures, or battling mobs, this pack ensures smoother gameplay, faster loading times, and higher FPS. Use this modpack as a Base for your own modded Packs for the Best modded Minecraft Experience!

💨 Blazing Fast Performance: A curated selection of optimization mods to reduce lag and boost frame rates.
🎨 Vanilla Friendly: No gameplay changes—just a faster, cleaner experience.
⚙️ Easy to Modify: Just Unlock the Profile and add your Mods.
🖥️ Perfect for Low-End PCs: Optimized for maximum performance on all systems even with Heavy mods.

Experience Minecraft like never before—smooth, stable, and optimized with Optimized Forgium! 🚀✨

For the 1.12.2 Versions it is recommended to add Optifine to the pack.
